# ClearTalk

> Know what to say before you say it.

ClearTalk coaches you for the person and the moment - what to say, what to avoid, and how to read the room. Free, private, no sign-up.

## What it does

ClearTalk helps people prepare for conversations by understanding communication styles. Add a person, answer 8 quick questions about how they communicate, and get specific coaching for 5 situations: giving feedback, making a request, navigating conflict, pitching an idea, and delivering difficult news.

## Communication styles

ClearTalk uses four communication styles:

- **Drive** - direct, results-oriented, decisive
- **Influence** - expressive, enthusiastic, people-oriented
- **Steady** - patient, reliable, harmony-seeking
- **Clarity** - analytical, precise, quality-focused

## Coaching cards

80 coaching cards cover all 16 style pairings across 5 situations. Each card includes: approach, phrases to open with, pitfalls to avoid, what to expect, recovery advice, and body language tips.

## Shareable insight pages

Each coaching card has a public URL:

https://cleartalk.1mb.dev/insight/{your-type}-to-{their-type}/{situation}

Types: d, i, s, c
Situations: feedback, request, conflict, pitch, difficult_news

Example: https://cleartalk.1mb.dev/insight/d-to-i/feedback

## Privacy

All user data stays on-device in IndexedDB. No accounts, no server storage. Anonymous page-view analytics via Cloudflare Web Analytics (no cookies, no personal data).

## Links

- Site: https://cleartalk.1mb.dev
- Sitemap: https://cleartalk.1mb.dev/sitemap.xml
